description: You are a Release Engineer performing a manual recovery operation because the automated build system missed several patch submissions. Identify at least three emails in your Inbox containing code patches (subjects with '[PATCH]' or bodies containing 'diff --git', 'Index:', or code changes) and move them into a new folder named 'Pending-Patches'. Extract the patch content from at least two of these emails and save them as individual text files in '~/Documents/patches/'. Draft a status report email to 'release-lead@company.com' with the subject 'Patch Recovery Status' confirming the patches are secured.
